info.name: SkillSwap API
info.description: Postman collection for the SkillSwap Angular + Django project. Cookie-based JWT authentication is used, so keep the Postman cookie jar enabled after login.

request.description: Creates a new user and sets JWT cookies.
Logs in and stores JWT cookies for later requests.
Uses the refresh cookie and returns a refreshed session message.
Blacklists the refresh token when present and clears auth cookies.
Returns the currently authenticated user profile.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Lists active services and supports optional search/category filtering.
